fields.title: API First Ops: Provisioning Kafka Infrastructure from AsyncAPI

frontmatter.title: API First Ops: Provisioning Kafka Infrastructure from AsyncAPI
frontmatter.author: Ivan Garcia Sainz-Aja
frontmatter.excerpt: API First Ops extends API First from code generation to infrastructure provisioning: use the same AsyncAPI spec to describe Kafka topics, schemas, ACLs, retry topics, and DLQs, then generate Terraform from it.
